summary: Propagate budget remediation guidance across AlertManager, dashboard budget API, and observability UI so runtime, API, and UI agree on next-step actions.
root_cause: Remediation metadata was added in one layer, but the dashboard API and UI still consumed the legacy budget summary contract.
fix_approach: Added structured remediation output to the budget API, extended UI rendering for actionable guidance, and aligned threshold coverage in alert-manager tests.

validation.notes: Budget summaries now include remediation metadata and the observability UI surfaces next-step guidance.
